creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-08-15 04:19:20 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/xpi-firegpg      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  New Port: www/xpi-firegpg An extension that acts as an assistant for using GPG
  
          FireGPG is a Firefox extension which brings an interface
          to encrypt, decrypt, sign or verify the signature of text
          in any web page using GnuPG.
  
          WWW: http://getfiregpg.org/index.html
  
  PR:             ports/125919
  Submitted by:   Ashish Shukla <wahjava@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2122    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/www/xpi-firegpg/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/xpi-firegpg/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/xpi-firegpg/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/www/xpi-firegpg/pkg-plist (new)
